output: Executed batch 9 task `T13`. The remaining clip CRUD and library sync logic now lives in `useClipEditing`, the obsolete `useTimelineEditing` hook was deleted, provider composition was updated to import the split hooks directly, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, and a checkpoint was written to `.megaplan/plans/video-editor-timeline-well-20260325-1848/execution_batch_9.json`.
deviations: T13 required a follow-on edit in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.ts` so the provider now composes `useClipEditing`, `useAssetManagement`, `useExternalDrop`, and `useClipResize` directly after deleting `useTimelineEditing`; otherwise the rename would have left TypeScript broken.
Advisory observation mismatch: git status/content hash delta found unclaimed files: src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx

task_updates.executor_notes: Created `useClipEditing` with the remaining clip CRUD and library sync handlers (`onChange`, `onOverlayChange`, delete/split/mute/text-add flows) and removed `useTimelineEditing.ts`. `useTimelineState` now imports the split hooks directly so the old name is fully gone. `npx tsc --noEmit` passes, `rg -n "useTimelineEditing|UseTimelineEditingResult|UseTimelineEditingArgs" src` returns no hits, and `wc -l src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipEditing.ts` reports 246 LOC.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `useClipEditing.ts` is 246 LOC and contains the focused clip CRUD plus resize-sync handlers (`onChange`, `onOverlayChange`, delete/reset/split/mute/text-add). `rg -n "useTimelineEditing|UseTimelineEditingResult|UseTimelineEditingArgs" src` returns no hits, and `useTimelineState.ts` now composes `useClipEditing`, `useAssetManagement`, `useExternalDrop`, and `useClipResize` directly.
